binding_site_description: User should replace this row with the protein binding site used for docking.
disease_context: Demo placeholder only; no disease context is asserted by the bundled molecule example.
mechanism_context: Demo placeholder only; no mechanism is asserted by the bundled molecule example.

disclaimer: Target metadata is project setup context for computational triage only; it is not experimental target validation clinical rationale or evidence of efficacy or safety.
